# Oil Based Fluids

**Summary**: Drilling fluids that use oil as the primary base, offering high lubricity but posing higher environmental risks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] analyzed OBF and its requirement for containment and treatment.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] Used for drilling through troublesome shales and in high temperature/pressure wells.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] Survey-based quantification.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- 31.6% of the respondent companies used the Oil Based Fluids. ([[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012, p. 10]])
